## Summary
- What changed:
- Why:

## Branch / Commit Format
- Branch: `dev/<type>/<short-name>`
- Commit format: `type(scope): summary`

## Validation
- [ ] `ruff check src tests`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `mypy src/voodoo_loader` (if relevant)

## Risk and Rollback
- Risk level:
- Rollback plan:

## Documentation
- [ ] `PRD.md` updated (if requirements changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-visible change)
- [ ] `SESSION_CONTEXT.md` incident/update added (if bugfix or reliability change)
